name: branchline-git-workbench
description: Development-only browser and accessibility checks for the dependency-free Branchline Windows runtime.

scripts.test:syntax: node --check web/branchline-api.js && node --check web/branchline-state.js && node --check web/branchline-render.js && node --check web/branchline-actions.js && node --check web/branchline-a11y.js && node --check web/app.js
